subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou seest one of Thy branches circling round Thy will and turning unto Thee when others turn away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری احد افنانک طائفا حول ارادتک و اقبل الیک اذ اعرض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
